title: 8 Effective Herbal Creams for Fever Blister on Lip Treatment
description: Aloe barbadensis cream is a great remedy for fever blisters on the lip. This is because it has anti-inflammatory properties that help to reduce swelling and pain. The cream also has antibacterial properties that prevent infection and promote healing. Aloe vera contains compounds like glycerin and vitamins A, C, and E, which help to soothe and calm the skin. When applied to a fever blister, it helps to dry out the blister and speed up the healing process. It also helps to reduce the red...
